description: Simulate a Q&A session moderation scenario in the 'TownHallQandA' meeting using two side-by-side Firefox windows. Join as 'Moderator Alice' in the left window and 'Citizen Bob' in the right window. Have Bob raise his hand to signal a question, then use Alice's moderator controls to lower Bob's hand. The task is complete when the hand icon is dismissed via the moderator's view.
